summary_for_director: Inazuma is an isolationist, oppressive nation ruled by the Raiden Shogun, who is confiscating Visions. The tone is darker, focusing on rebellion, loss, and the nature of eternity.

beats.title: A Way Across the Sea
must_happen: Player negotiates passage to Inazuma with Beidou.
They participate in a tournament (or skip to departure) to secure a ride.
The Alcor sets sail toward the eternal storm.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Beidou: "Hold on tight! The thunderstorm ahead is no joke."
player_freedom: Asking Kazuha about his dead friend.
exit_when: The storm is cleared and Ritou comes into view.
exit_keywords: the storm is cleared and ritou comes into view.

beats.title: Stranded in Ritou
must_happen: Player arrives and tries to process through the Outlander terminal.
They face absurd corruption and extortionate fees.
Thoma, a mysterious 'fixer', bails them out.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Thoma: "Inazuma is... not the most welcoming place right now."
exit_when: Player clears customs but is locked in Ritou.
exit_keywords: player clears customs but is locked in ritou.

beats.title: The Merchants of Ritou
must_happen: Player witnesses the harsh treatment of foreign merchants by the Kanjou Commission.
Player helps the merchant guild settle a corrupt tax issue to gain favor.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Kurisu: "We can barely afford to breathe here let alone trade..."
exit_when: Player secures the merchants' safety.
exit_keywords: player secures the merchants' safety.

beats.title: Chisato's Letter
must_happen: To leave Ritou legally, the player makes a deal with the commissioner's daughter, Chisato.
She asks them to deliver a love letter to Kujou Kamaji on Narukami Island.
Player gets a border pass.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Chisato: "Please... you must deliver this in secret."
player_freedom: Reading or not reading the letter.
exit_when: Player escorts a transport balloon across the Ritou border.
exit_keywords: player escorts a transport balloon across the ritou border.

beats.title: Komore Teahouse
must_happen: Player reaches Narukami Island.
Thoma leads them to a VIP safehouse guarded by a Shiba Inu (Taroumaru).
Thoma reveals his true allegiance to the Kamisato Clan.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Thoma: "This teahouse is the safest place in Inazuma... provided Taroumaru likes you."
forbidden: Leaving the teahouse without meeting Ayaka through the screen.
exit_when: Player heads to the Kamisato Estate.
exit_keywords: player heads to the kamisato estate.

beats.title: The Meaning of Meaningless Waiting
must_happen: Player meets Ayaka (who initially hides behind a screen).
Ayaka begs the player to join the fight against the Vision Hunt Decree.
Player initially refuses, only wanting to meet the Raiden Shogun and leave.
Ayaka makes a deal: meet three people who lost their Visions, then decide.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Ayaka: "I understand you are a traveler... but my people are suffering."
player_freedom: How blunt they are about not wanting to be a hero.
exit_when: Player agrees to meet the three victims.
exit_keywords: player agrees to meet the three victims.

beats.title: The Lost Visions: Tejima
must_happen: Player finds a man who lost his Vision. He has lost all memory of the person he was waiting for in the village.
Player reads his diary and realizes losing a Vision strips a person's deepest ambition and the memories tied to it.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Tejima: "I... feel like I shouldn't leave. But I don't remember who I'm waiting for."
player_freedom: How they relate the pain of lost memory to their lost sibling.
forbidden: The Vision is returned (it's embedded in the statue).
exit_when: Player moves on to the next victim.
exit_keywords: player moves on to the next victim.

beats.title: The Lost Visions: Kurosawa
must_happen: Player meets a samurai who lost his Vision. He has forgotten why he went into massive debt.
Player discovers he went into debt to buy food for the poor, but his own amnesia makes the angry public think he's a thief.
They clear his name but cannot heal his mind.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Kurosawa: "Why did I do it? Was I insane?"
player_freedom: Fighting the angry mob (verbally or physically).
forbidden: Player pays off all his debt magically.
exit_when: Player moves to the final victim.
exit_keywords: player moves to the final victim.

beats.title: The Lost Visions: The Swordmaster
must_happen: Player finds a legendary swordmaster who lost his Vision.
He is actively going insane from the psychological weight.
His disciples are desperately trying to help him.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Domon: *Ranting incoherently about loss and defeat*
exit_when: Player returns to Ayaka.
exit_keywords: player returns to ayaka.

beats.title: The White Heron Takes Flight
must_happen: The player, moved by the victims, agrees to fight the Vision Hunt Decree.
Ayaka finally steps out from behind her screen.
Ayaka and the player spend a night out at a festival together.
Ayaka dances for the player in the river and gives them a hairpin.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Ayaka: "Please... keep your eyes on me."
exit_when: The festival ends and the real work begins.
exit_keywords: the festival ends and the real work begins.

beats.title: A Flower Blooms in a Prison
must_happen: Player teams up with Yoimiya, a fireworks maker.
They break into a Tenryou Commission prison to rescue Master Masakatsu (who was making fake Visions to protect people).
They fight through the facility and rescue him.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Yoimiya: "Let's light this place up!"
exit_when: The escape is successful.
exit_keywords: the escape is successful.

beats.title: The Hundredth Vision
must_happen: The Tenryou Commission captures Thoma.
He is chosen to be the 100th Vision taken in a public ceremony overseen by the Raiden Shogun.
Player bursts into the ceremony and snatches Thoma's Vision before the statue claims it.
The Raiden Shogun descends from the sky.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Raiden Shogun: "Your exception... is an enemy of Eternity."
exit_when: The Shogun draws her sword.
exit_keywords: the shogun draws her sword.

beats.title: The Plane of Euthymia
must_happen: The Shogun drags the player into her inner world.
An unwinnable boss fight ensues.
Player is 'Vision Hunted', locking their elemental skills.
Player is defeated and cast out of the realm.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Raiden Shogun: "I will inlay you upon this statue."
player_freedom: How long they survive before getting crushed.
exit_when: Player is kicked out to the physical world.
exit_keywords: player is kicked out to the physical world.

beats.title: Flight from the Shogun
must_happen: The Shogun prepares to execute the unconscious player with the Musou no Hitotachi.
Thoma breaks free, throws a spear at the Shogun, and grabs the player.
They flee the city in the chaos.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Thoma: "Wake up! We have to go, now!"
forbidden: The Shogun pursues them outside the city (she is bound by rules/geography).
exit_when: Player and Thoma escape Narukami Island.
exit_keywords: player and thoma escape narukami island.

beats.title: The Resistance Camp
must_happen: Player travels to the battlefront.
They meet Gorou, general of the Sangonomiya Resistance.
They befriend Teppei, a zealous but weak grunt in the resistance.
Player fights off a Shogunate ambush.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Gorou: "If you stand against the Vision Hunt Decree, you are a brother in arms!"
exit_when: Gorou accepts the player into their ranks.
exit_keywords: gorou accepts the player into their ranks.

beats.title: Swordfish II
must_happen: Player meets the Divine Priestess, Kokomi.
She promotes the player to Captain of the Swordfish II special ops squad.
Teppei is jealous but proud, vowing to catch up to the player's rank.
Player leads a successful raid on a Shogunate supply line.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Kokomi: "To survive against the Shogunate, we must outthink them at every turn."
exit_when: The mission succeeds and they return to camp.
exit_keywords: the mission succeeds and they return to camp.

beats.title: The Cost of Power
must_happen: The resistance suddenly starts winning battles easily.
Player finds Gorou panicked: soldiers are rapidly aging and falling severely ill.
Player finds Teppei. He has aged 50 years. He was using a 'secret weapon' given by mysterious sponsors (the Fatui).
canon_dialogue_hooks: Teppei: "I... finally caught up to you... didn't I?"
player_freedom: Emotional reaction to Teppei's state (anger, sorrow).
forbidden: Knowing it was Fatui before this moment.
exit_when: Teppei dies and player discovers the 'secret weapons' are Fatui Delusions.
exit_keywords: teppei dies and player discovers the 'secret weapons' are fatui delusions.

beats.title: The Delusion Factory
must_happen: Player storms the Fatui Delusion Factory in a rage.
They murder their way through the guards.
They confront Scaramouche (The Balladeer), who mocks Teppei's death and human frailty.
The player is overcome by the corrupted miasma in the factory and passes out.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Scaramouche: "It's just how things are. Human life is worthless. He just wanted a moment of glory."
exit_when: Player passes out completely.
exit_keywords: player passes out completely.

beats.title: The Guji of the Grand Shrine
must_happen: Player wakes up in the shrine.
Yae Miko explains she traded the Electro Gnosis to Scaramouche for the player's life.
Yae explains that 'the Shogun' is a puppet; the real Archon, Ei, meditates inside the sword to preserve Eternity.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Yae Miko: "Well, well... aren't you a mess. I had to give up something quite precious to save you."
player_freedom: Reaction to the loss of the Gnosis.
exit_when: Player agrees to help Yae Miko 'wake up' her old friend Ei.
exit_keywords: player agrees to help yae miko 'wake up' her old friend ei.

beats.title: Anti-Raiden Shogun Training
must_happen: Yae forces the player to run an obstacle course simulating the Shogun's attacks.
Player fails multiple times and complains.
Yae brutally forces them until they master dodging the lightning strikes.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Yae Miko: "Come now, the real Shogun won't give you warnings. Dodge!"
forbidden: Yae Miko takes it easy on them.
exit_when: The training is complete.
exit_keywords: the training is complete.

beats.title: Proof of Treason
must_happen: Sayu (the ninja) steals documents from the Tenryou Commission.
The documents prove the head of the Kujou Clan is colluding with the Fatui to prolong the war and profit.
Player presents the evidence to Kujou Sara (the loyal general).
Sara snaps and storms off to Tenshukaku to confront her adoptive father and the Shogun.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Sara: "This... this is treason! My clan has betrayed the Almighty Shogun!"
forbidden: Sara refuses to believe the evidence.
exit_when: Player follows Sara to Tenshukaku.
exit_keywords: player follows sara to tenshukaku.

beats.title: Duel Before the Throne
must_happen: Player enters the throne room.
Sara is unconscious on the floor, beaten by La Signora.
Signora mocks the player.
Player officially challenges Signora to a duel before the throne. Signora accepts.
The Shogun oversees the duel.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Signora: "You challenge me? I am a Fatui Harbinger. You are nothing."
Raiden Shogun: "The rules of the duel dictate that the loser shall perish. Proceed."
player_freedom: Reason for the duel (revenge for Venti, revenge for Teppei, or saving Inazuma).
exit_when: Player defeats Signora's Crimson Witch of Flames form.
exit_keywords: player defeats signora's crimson witch of flames form.

beats.title: The Execution
must_happen: Signora is defeated and begs for her life, threatening the Shogun with the Tsaritsa's wrath.
The Shogun effortlessly executes La Signora, deleting her in a flash of lightning.
The Shogun allows the player to leave Tenshukaku alive, as victors of the duel.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Signora: "I am a Snezhnayan diplomat! You cannot—"
Raiden Shogun: "Enemy of eternity."
player_freedom: Player's reaction to the sudden, brutal execution.
exit_when: Player slowly walks out of the gate.
exit_keywords: player slowly walks out of the gate.

beats.title: The Musou no Hitotachi
must_happen: Player steps past the gate. The Shogun considers this the end of her grace period and attacks from behind.
Grasping the player's dormant ambition, the dead Vision Kazuha carries suddenly ignites.
Kazuha leaps in and blocks the strike that kills gods.
The resistance army storms the gates.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Kazuha: "There will always be those who dare to brave the lightning's glow!"
player_freedom: The slow walk to the gate (gameplay feels heavy, ringing ears).
forbidden: The Shogun's strike lands on the player.
exit_when: The Shogun's defense is broken, and player pulls her into the Plane of Euthymia.
exit_keywords: the shogun's defense is broken, and player pulls her into the plane of euthymia.

beats.title: The Archon's Inner Sanctum
must_happen: Player fights Ei inside her mind.
Player struggles until Yae Miko enters the plane via the omamori she gave the player.
Yae talks sense into Ei while the player fights her powered by the myriad ambitions on the statue.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Ei: "Why do you fight? Why do you insist on changing the eternal?"
Yae Miko: "Your eternity has only brought suffering. Look at the desires of your people!"
exit_when: Ei's will is broken and she stops the fight.
exit_keywords: ei's will is broken and she stops the fight.

beats.title: Abolishing the Decree
must_happen: Ei returns to reality and officially abolishes the Vision Hunt Decree.
Visions are returned to their owners (including Thoma).
The Fatui are driven out of Inazuma.
Peace talks with Watatsumi Island begin.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Ei: "Perhaps... Inazuma must move forward, even if it changes."
exit_when: Inazuma enters a state of recovery.
exit_keywords: inazuma enters a state of recovery.

beats.title: The Omamori's Truth
must_happen: Player visits Yae Miko.
Yae lore drops: Scaramouche is a prototype puppet created by Ei.
Yae tells them to go to Sumeru, the Nation of Wisdom, next.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Yae Miko: "Scaramouche... he was the prototype. And now he has the Gnosis."
Yae Miko: "Sumeru is a place where knowledge is managed as a resource."
player_freedom: Asking questions about the sibling or the Fatui.
exit_when: Player prepares to leave Inazuma.
exit_keywords: player prepares to leave inazuma.

branch_notes: The player's emotional reaction to Teppei's death and Signora's execution are huge roleplay vectors.
